element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Immediately practiced in initial cave exploration
Gradual progression through yellow triangle collection
Toggle between equipped weapons for tactical advantage
Gathering story information and quest objectives

typical_tension_triggers: Weapon level degradation on taking damage
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Alternating exploration and combat with narrative punctuation; tension builds through NPC backstory revelations and environmental stakes (Doctor's plan), released through peaceful village interactions and safe zones

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Side passages off main path leading to NPC encounters and upgrade caches
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Hidden areas accessed by shooting specific environmental objects or discovering concealed passages

difficulty_curve.early_game: Gentle introduction with basic platforming and weak enemies in Mimiga Village and initial caves
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating challenge through Egg Corridor and Grasstown with stronger enemy encounters and more complex puzzles
difficulty_curve.late_game: High difficulty with demanding boss fights, Sand Zone environmental hazards, and weapon leveling pressure from damage penalties
notable_spikes: Boss fights with weapon level loss stakes
Sand Zone navigation with red flower threats

notable_level_patterns.description: Safe sanctuary featuring NPCs providing story context, quest objectives, and world-building dialogue; no combat pressure
Linear progression through platforming challenges interspersed with enemy encounters; weapon leveling opportunities via crystal drops
Thematic area with story-relevant threats (red flowers causing enemy transformation); combines platforming with narrative stakes
Climactic encounter with elevated threat; weapon level loss on damage creates risk management tension
